creator: jSML4ThWwBID69YC@protonmail.com
text:
Trying to build databases/proxysql fails consistently. 

OS: FreeBSD 14.1 release
Building in a standard full jail. Build output below

-------------------------------------------------------
# portmaster -d databases/proxysql

===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/databases/proxysql

===>>> Gathering distinfo list for installed ports

===>>> Launching 'make checksum' for databases/proxysql in background
